params.name: Modern Times
params.description:
On August 31, 1936, the filming of Modern Times was completed.
Modern Times was one of the later works of Charlie Chaplin. It was one of Chaplin's most iconic films, not to mention his last to feature his famous character, The Tramp, in a silent role. The film was set during the Great Depression, a period of economic downturn. It followed the lives of a factory worker who was institutionalized after a breakdown, as well as a young orphaned girl who was arrested for theft. Through their storie …
